claim_bullets.bullet_text: Café Allongé is a drink midway between Espresso and Americano in strength, achieved through two methods: dilution or a longer extraction. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.6-6)

The dilution method adds hot water to Espresso Ristretto, releasing complex flavors; the long pull method achieves a similar oil-to-water ratio but with a different flavor profile. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.6-6)

source_record_text: Prefaces to the JavaScript Allongé book by Caffe Molinari
